reasoning.typography: Clean system with nice contrast between sans headline spans and body text. Not revolutionary but disciplined and personal. Avoids the Inter trap.
reasoning.hierarchy: Exceptional clarity—each section has one clear visual anchor. The intro portrait dominates, then writing cards with strong image+text rhythm. No competing elements.
reasoning.distinctiveness: Deeply personal—the 'walking NYC, investigating creative tooling, researching Brian Eno' is specific human work, not 'helping clients achieve goals.' Black void aesthetic is a strong choice.
reasoning.color: Black background with white text and selective color in the portrait gradient. Extremely restrained, maybe 2% accent color. Disciplined to the point of ascetic.
reasoning.density: Generous whitespace with confident content placement. Not afraid of negative space. Writing cards have good breathing room without feeling sparse or padded.
reasoning.voice: Structure reflects actual thought—'Beyond the Machine,' 'Everything Easy is Hard Again' are essay titles doing conceptual work, not 'Services/Process/Contact.' The IA is the story.

winning_patterns: Black void background creates dramatic stage for content—confident negative space
Writing section uses actual essay imagery (exploding cog, anvil+balloon) not stock decoration
Specific biographical details ('walking NYC... researching Brian Eno') vs generic designer bio
Visual hierarchy through scale/image rather than color noise
Long-form essay titles that do conceptual work ('The Web's Grain')
anti_patterns: Footer credits list could be more visually integrated—feels like database dump
Some small type sizing might be pushing legibility limits on the black
Newsletter embed iframe is the one generic widget disrupting the aesthetic
